user_message: Can you help me triage this? The customer (Alpine Ski House) is asking about territory planning.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-13 13:30 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Alpine Ski House territory planning

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about territory planning. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
Date: 2024-01-09 16:43 EST
Subject: Re: Re: territory planning Timeline

There's been a change in our timeline for territory planning. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

Meeting: territory planning Discussion - Alpine Ski House
Date: 2024-03-11
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House), Marcus Williams (Microsoft)

[00:02:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on territory planning from our last session.

[00:06:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on technical validation and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.

[00:11:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on budget approval and found that the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades.

[00:14:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): On the territory planning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around cost optimization.

[00:16:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): On the territory planning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around partner engagement.

[00:18:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): The timeline for performance requirements is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence
